Name: BRID
Purpose: Required by any all all UA's above 250g by LAW (cannot be DIY'ed and this is the cheapest one I could find including shipping

Name: Registration  Sticker
Purpose: Required by any all all UA's above 250g by LAW

Name: ESC
Purpose: used to control the motor and split power between reciever, servos and motor

Name: Servo rods and linkages
Purpose: Used to connect the servo to the control surfaces (bought in person - no grant required)

Name: T6L sport (Transmitter) and R3106GF (Reciever)
Purpose: Used to control the aircraft ((bought in person - no grant required))

Name: birch plywood
Purpose: Used for the motor mount (should be brought in person)

Name: 2 cell Lipo battery
Purpose: Used to provide electrical power (bought in person - no grant required)

Name: Servo extensions
Purpose: makes servo cable longer (bought in person - no grant required)

Name: Depron Foam sheets
Purpose: Used to build the airframe (bought in person - no grant required)

Name: Servos
Purpose: Used to move control surfaces (bought in person - no grant required)

Name: Motor
Purpose: powers the aircraft (bought in person - no grant required)
